heading: Monday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, with some lower 40s in the broad valleys west, and around 30 northeast and the Adirondacks. Southwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph early, and diminishing overnight east of the Greens.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny, then increasing afternoon clouds west of theGreens. Highs in the mid to upper 60s in the south, and upper 50s to mid 60s north, except low to mid 50s in the St. Lawrence Valley. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, except becoming north near the international border.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Increasing clouds. Chance of rain showers; a rising chance late in the far north, with freezing rain likely in the St. Lawrence Valley, and possible northeast, and in the northern Champlain Valley. Lows in the low to mid 30s north, and mid 30s to around 40 south. Winds becoming light and variable, except becoming northeast 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.
